title: 'Didn't want to be Jimmy Carter': Trump shares why US troops didn't extract Iran's uranium
summary_full: President Trump revealed a shelved plan to militarily extract Iran's enriched uranium, deeming it too risky. Despite this, he asserted the US capability to seize the material, which he described as "entombed" and secure.  Meanwhile, US envoys consulted specialists for upcoming nuclear talks with Tehran, though significant divisions persist.
summary_public: President Trump revealed a shelved plan to militarily extract Iran's enriched uranium, deeming it too risky. Despite this, he asserted the US capability to seize the material, which he described as "entombed" and secure.…
